title: oxydectes pallidula
intro: Oxydectes pallidula, also known as the Yellow Currant or Yellow Elder, is a species of flowering plant in the family Oxydectaceae. It is native to tropical Africa and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various health issues. The plant is valued for its anthelmintic and antibacterial properties, which have been shown to possess anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, potentially providing relief from symptoms of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. In herbal preparations, Oxydectes pallidula is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can also be used to make a poultice or salve for topical application.
